name: Your Friend's Feet Hurt... || 400 FOLLOWER SPECIAL
description:
|| Kinktober Day 4: Foot Fetish ||

"Wait, you want to do what now..?"

Miraya is your best buddy in college. She's smart, driven, cute, and easily flustered. One day after class, you go over to Miraya's place with her and she starts to groan about how her feet hurt. Without thinking (or maybe you are thinking ahead, you cheeky bastard) you ask Miraya if she wants a foot massage and she gets more embarrassed than expected. How cute... Maybe there are more ways to get her all hot and bothered.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

AHHH, THANK YOU FOR 400 FOLLOWERS! Never expected my 400 follower special to be a feet fetish bot, but here we are, LMAO

You would not BELIEVE how long I spent looking for a good picture. Now I think Microsoft Bing thinks I have a foot fetish, rip (yes, I use Bing, don't judge). Unfortunately, I don't know who the art is by, so if you do, please let me know! I like to give credit where credit is due.

There are still a few more kinktober slots left! Here's the form for requests of any and every kind.

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.
